label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. First, the problem says that the coffee shop was closed after 8pm. So any time after 8pm is out. Also, Andrew woke up at 8am, so before that isn't possible either. Now let's look at the times when others saw Andrew doing other things. Elizabeth saw him fixing his computer from 11am to 3pm. That means he was at the electronic store during that time. So he couldn't go to the coffee shop then. That would eliminate option D (11am to 3pm). Jennifer saw him at the bike shop from 3pm to 4pm. So he was busy buying a bike then. That time is covered in option A (3pm to 4pm), so he couldn't have gone to the coffee shop during that hour either. Anthony saw Andrew at the bakery from 4pm to 6pm buying cookies. That's a two-hour window where he wasn't at the coffee shop. So the time between 4pm and 6pm is taken up. Option B is 6pm to 8pm. But wait, the coffee shop closes at 8pm. He was at the theater from 6pm to 8pm according to Betty. So he was watching a movie then. Therefore, 6pm to 8pm is also occupied. That leaves the time between when he woke up at 8am and when Elizabeth saw him at 11am. That's from 8am to 11am. The coffee shop is open during that time, and there's no mention of Andrew being occupied with anything else during those three hours. So he could have gone to the coffee shop between 8am and 11am. That's option C. Let me check again to make sure I didn't miss anything. He was at the computer store from 11-3, then bike shop 3-4,
